prompt: Hero has 9h 8h on 7c 6d 5s Kd 2c. Which best five-card hand can Hero make?
why_v1: The best five are 9-8-7-6-5, which make a nine-high straight.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Use the strongest five cards: 9-8-7-6-5 is a straight.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Check all seven available cards and select 9-8-7-6-5 as the best five.
